title: Supporting student health beyond the clinic: Social prescribing in higher ed
summary_en: A student visits the campus counseling center for the third time this semester. She’s not in crisis. She’s lonely, overwhelmed, and unsure where she fits.
title_cn: 超越诊所服务范畴保障学生健康：高等教育领域的社会处方
